mano_cua.result_summary: 第12步引导文案与实际步骤上下文不匹配。Step 12 高亮的是'Open Modal'按钮，但显示的文案与 Step 11 完全相同（'Moreover you can highlight multiple elements...Try clicking the ? tooltip and playing with tabs...'）。这段关于 DOM mutations 和 tab 交互的文字适用于 Step 11，但与 Step 12 的 Open Modal 按钮功能毫不相关。Step 12 缺少正确的 Modal 功能描述文案。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Step 12 displays the exact same text as Step 11. The text about 'clicking the ? tooltip and playing with tabs' was appropriate for Step 11 (which highlighted the section with a ? button) but is completely wrong for Step 12 which highlights the 'Open Modal' button. This is a clear content configuration bug — duplicate/wrong step description text.
